name: PVR Kotak Platinum Credit Card
exclusions: movie coupon benefit depends on monthly spend threshold and claim flow
annual fee is not waived according to Kotak product content
milestoneBenefits: Get 2 free PVR tickets every month on spends of Rs 10,000, each ticket up to Rs 400
additionalBenefits: 15% cashback on food and beverages at PVR
5% cashback on movie tickets at PVR box office

salaried: Eligibility is subject to Kotak Mahindra Bank approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to Kotak Mahindra Bank approval criteria
